description_long: This is a chunky, multi-colored sneaker with a thick, layered sole and a bold, urban design. The upper features a mix of materials in gray, red, black, blue, and white, with prominent stitching and panel overlays. The laces are thick and patterned, tied in a loose knot, and the tongue displays a visible brand label. The midsole is off-white with a yellowed, worn appearance, and the outsole is rugged with a textured grip. The heel area is reinforced and padded, with a blue accent wrapping around the back. The overall look suggests a high-fashion, streetwear-inspired shoe with visible signs of use and urban wear.
description: A chunky, multi-colored sneaker with a thick, layered sole, bold color blocking, and visible signs of wear. The shoe features a mix of gray, red, blue, and yellow tones with a rugged, urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick laces, brand label on the tongue, and layered toe box with gray, white, and red panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the red and black side panels, blue heel accent, and the brand name on the midfoot.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded blue heel collar, yellow outsole, and the layered construction of the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the blue heel, red and gray side panels, and the overall chunky profile of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Text logo on the left side panel in black, and a label on the tongue in white and red.
